theme: Condo distress radar + resale undervalue by district
hook: D10 condos asking 51% below median — what the data actually says

slides.sub: This week's radar flags D10, D09 and D15 listings asking 38–51% below their district median — live on PropertyGuru right now.

slides.lead: Two d'Leedon units hit the market this week at half the district median.
slides.source: PropertyGuru listings · POV Guy radar · 21 Apr 2026

slides.pre: d'Leedon ask vs D10 condo median psf
slides.post: Largest single-project gap in this week's 50-listing condo distress scan — at S$1,182 psf on a 3,766 sqft unit.
slides.source: PropertyGuru · POV Guy distress radar · Apr 2026

slides.title: Three distress clusters this week

items.body: D10 (d'Leedon, Montview, Lutheran Towers): 4 listings at 39–51% below the S$2,408 psf district median — the deepest pocket in this scan.
D09 Mackenzie 88: 2-bed asking S$1,845 psf vs D09 median S$2,973 psf — a 38% gap on a sub-$1.6m ticket in the Core Central Region.
D15 (Malvern Springs, Villa Marina): 37–40% below the S$2,349 psf median — East Coast freehold at pricing not seen since pre-2021 levels.

slides.source: PropertyGuru · POV Guy distress radar · Apr 2026

slides.title: Biggest condo discount vs district median
slides.source: PropertyGuru · POV Guy distress radar · Apr 2026

slides.label: What the gap means
slides.punch: Listings this far below median almost always carry a story: lease decay, legal encumbrance, deferred maintenance, or an overleveraged seller who needs out fast. The number alone isn't the edge — understanding why it's there is.
slides.punch_bold: Do the caveat check before you do the viewing.

slides.title: Best-value distress beyond D9–D11

items.body: D05 — Westcove & Blue Horizon: two listings at 33–37% below the S$2,106 psf median; sub-$1.5m entry with HV/West Coast MRT access.
D15 — Malvern Springs: 2,734 sqft freehold asking S$1,419 psf, 40% below district median — rare large-format East Coast unit at this psf.
D28 — Seletar Springs: 4-bed, 2,067 sqft asking S$1,064 psf vs median S$1,625 psf, 35% below — North-East landed-fringe condo at sub-$2.2m.

slides.source: PropertyGuru · POV Guy distress radar · Apr 2026

caption:
D10 condos asking 51% below district median — here's what the distress radar picked up this week.

• d'Leedon listed at S$1,182 psf vs the D10 median of S$2,408 psf — a 51% gap on a 3,766 sqft unit
• D09, D12, D14 and D15 also flagged: 4 projects asking 38–44% below their respective district medians
• Listings this far below median almost always carry a reason — caveat check before viewing is non-negotiable

The data is live. The question is whether the discount reflects value or a problem you inherit.
